name: vayusetu-mumbai
description: Mumbai ward-level air quality intelligence platform (full-stack capstone)

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w src/api" "npm run dev -w src/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w src/api && npm run build -w src/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w src/api && npm run test -w src/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w src/api && npm run lint -w src/web
